note: Seeds 7,42 complete. Seed 123 was terminated (SIGTERM) and needs rerun. Will be updated to 'complete' with n=3 stats when all finish.

01_minimal_strict_full_train.config: full train split, 2 epochs, batch_size=2048, GPU-enabled neural nets

deepproblog_published.source: Manhaeve et al., Neural Probabilistic Logic Programming in DeepProbLog, JAIR 2021
deepproblog_published.notes: Published results use full MNIST training set (30k pairs), CPU evaluation via PySDD.

protocol_notes: XLOG uses --train-limit 512 (256 pairs); DeepProbLog baseline uses full MNIST or 1024-limited.
Hardware: NVIDIA RTX PRO 3000 Blackwell Laptop GPU for both XLOG and DeepProbLog baseline.
XLOG uses train_model_tensor (GPU-native loss accumulation, CUDA d-DNNF circuits).
DeepProbLog baseline uses PySDD/ProbLog CPU inference with GPU-enabled neural networks.
Metric mismatch: XLOG reports training loss (no eval split); DeepProbLog reports held-out accuracy.
Direct accuracy comparison requires adding held-out evaluation to XLOG's 01_minimal.
Training time: XLOG mean = 5.97h (5 epochs, 256 pairs, n=2); DeepProbLog strict = 2.5h (2 epochs, full dataset).
Per-epoch time dominated by WMC circuit evaluation (~17 sec/query), not GPU tensor operations.
Seed 123 was killed by SIGTERM during D4 compilation; needs rerun when GPU is free.
